Allow: /

# Allow all crawlers
Allow: /about
Allow: /services
Allow: /contact
Allow: /blog
Allow: /careers
Allow: /faq
Allow: /privacy
Allow: /terms

# Disallow admin and private areas
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /private/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_next/
Disallow: /static/

# Crawl delay (optional)
Crawl-delay: 1
